fields.label: Field Name
fields.description: Name of the field to include in search configuration

fields.label: Search Type
fields.options:
Full Text
Exact Match
Prefix
Fuzzy
Range
None
fields.description: How this field should be searched

fields.label: Is Enabled
fields.description: If unchecked, this field is excluded from search

fields.label: Is Filterable
fields.description: If checked, show as a filter option in search UI

fields.label: Is Sortable
fields.description: If checked, allow sorting by this field

fields.label: Is Faceted
fields.description: If checked, show facet counts in search results

fields.label: Boost Weight
fields.description: Search relevance weight (1.0 = normal, higher = more important)

fields.label: Filter Widget
fields.options:
Text Input
Dropdown
Checkbox List
Range Slider
Date Picker
Color Picker
Auto
fields.description: UI widget type for filtering (Auto = inferred from field type)

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which this filter appears in the UI

fields.label: Default Sort Direction
fields.description: Default sort direction when sorting by this field
